posts.text:
In my first essay for @newlinesmag, I argue Tehran helped the Assad regime violently crush protests starting in 2011—then used those tactics on Iranians in January.

If the IRI survives the war, it'll unleash a level of repression not seen before.newlinesmag.com/argument/wha…

Our loved ones come for air momentarily only to plunge back into Internet darkness…


NetBlocks (@netblocks)

ℹ️ Update: Network data show at a brief restoration of internet connectivity in #Iran at hour 444 of the country's second-longest blackout, as some users report coming momentarily back online after an apparent filtering system glitch. However, the restoration is not sustained.





— https://nitter.net/netblocks/status/2034364834607693873#m
RT @tourajdaryaee: My father had a hand in the building of this place which was bombed today. I am happy he has passed away and does not se…
The Googoosh and Khomeini memes are endless during this war

There’s now a pattern of Israel targeting key actors involved in the repression of the Iranian people:

-  SNSC Secretary Ali Larijani (for his role in the January massacre) 
- Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani 
- Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib

To clarify, the reason I bring this up is because of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s recent speech about creating conditions for the Iranian people to rise up in the coming days (which is now).
Israel’s defense minister said that Israel killed Iranian Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib.  wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-us…
